resources.string: Create an emergency draft. Secure persistent emergency storage and nearby synchronisation are added in the next implementation phase.
Your role changes RescueMesh labels and future feed defaults. It does not verify your identity, training, or emergency-service authority.
RescueMesh role saved on this device.
No validated RescueMesh emergency messages are available in this app session.
Emergency pilot forum created locally. Share it with trusted participants using Briar’s forum-sharing workflow.
Trusted emergency forum is ready on this device.
Emergency forum could not be prepared. Check that the Briar account is unlocked.
Nearby peer discovery and verified delivery status will appear here. A saved message is not proof that emergency services have been notified.
Bluetooth: %1$s · Wi-Fi: %2$s. This only reports local radio readiness; it does not show nearby peers.
No local SOS has been created on this device.
This screen stores a local emergency draft in Phase 1. It does not yet confirm transmission, relay, rescue dispatch, or delivery.
Offline urgency suggestion will appear as you type. Your selected priority remains in control.
Offline suggestion: %1$s. Indicators: %2$s. This does not change your selected priority.
Describe the emergency, nearby landmark, and immediate need
Location sharing will be enabled after permissioned capture is implemented
Location permission and capture will be connected before transmission is enabled. An SOS must remain usable without location.
Emergency message stored locally and queued for authorised Briar synchronisation. Delivery is not yet confirmed.
The emergency message could not be queued. Check that the Briar account is unlocked and try again.
